info.title: ASPICE Documentation Platform API
info.description: Multi-tenant, role-based SaaS API for automating automotive ASPICE / ISO 26262 documentation from C++ source code repositories.

patch.summary: Approve or deny an access request (admin only)

get.summary: Preview the incremental baseline decision for a commit (read-only)
get.description: Mirrors what an auto-mode job would pick, without any checkout/clone. Returns the auto/chosen baseline, ancestor/nearest flags, changed-file count, decision, and warnings (a full-decision stub when no local checkout exists yet).

get.summary: Get the current active job for a project
Server-Sent Events stream for live job progress

200.description: SSE stream. Events: phase_update, activity_update, log_line, job_complete, job_failed.

get.summary: List C++ functions discovered by a job

post.summary: Re-queue DOCX export for an existing job (admin only)

get.summary: Get document status counts for a project

post.summary: Approve all documents for a version (admin only)
Batch assign reviewers to multiple documents (admin only)
Trigger bulk DOCX export for a version

patch.summary: Update document status or due date (admin only)

post.summary: Assign reviewers to a document (admin only)
Request changes on a document (admin only)
Invite a member to the project (admin only)

delete.summary: Remove a member from the project (admin only)

parameters.name: current
parameters.description: Version tag, commit SHA, or version ID to treat as current

parameters.name: baseline
parameters.description: Version tag, commit SHA, or version ID to treat as baseline

get.summary: List changed documents between two versions
Get section-level diff for a document

patch.summary: Update visibility of a single function (admin only)

get.summary: List unread notifications for current user

Conflict.description: Conflict — resource already exists or state prevents the action

baseline_version_id.description: Incremental baseline used (null for a full generation)

reference_version_id.description: Explicit incremental baseline; wins over auto-select under mode=auto

mode.description: auto = pick nearest-ancestor completed version as the incremental baseline; full = force a full generation

narrowed_parse.description: M4.4 opt-in: re-parse only affected TUs and merge into the baseline parser snapshot (large repos)
